title: Broadway to Hollywood
writer: Willard Mack, Edgar Allan Woolf, Robert E. Hopkins
actors: Alice Brady, Frank Morgan, Jackie Cooper
plot: Ted and Lulu Hackett are vaudeville's The Hacketts, a fairly successful song-and-dance team. They bring their son Ted Jr. up in the business and he soon eclipses them. When the son is offered a starring role on Broadway, he arrang...
